title: Programming - How Do I?
description:
Programming - How Do I?

Programming - How Do I...?

How do I create programs?

You can create programs for your project using one of the following methods:

	Select New
	 from the File menu.
	Select Edit
	 from the Project menu.
	Use the Project Explorer context menu.  Right
	 click on a folder and select New.

How do I use include files?

	Create one or more include files in the current
	 project.
	Add #define statements in the include files.
	Use the #include statement in each program
	 that needs to use definitions in an include file.

How do I handle errors?

By default, when an error occurs in a running program, it is handled by the system.  All tasks are paused and the source line that caused the error is highlighted in red.  Then all tasks must be stopped (you cannot continue).  You can handle errors in your programs and take the appropriate actions.  To handle errors in your programs, use the OnErr statement to define an error handler in one or more functions.   You should have at least one error handler in each of the main functions you are using.  For more details see Error handling.
